prerequisites: A Guru account with access to the content you want to sync.
Permission to generate API tokens: you must be an Admin or have the "Manage Apps & Integrations" permission to create a User Token.
Your Guru username (the login used for your Guru account), supplied via the required username config field.
A start_date (required) marking the earliest point from which to sync records.
The generated User Token, supplied as the password secret field for HTTP Basic authentication.

authMethods.name: API token (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Guru's REST API uses HTTP Basic Authentication in the form username:token. Set the username config field to your Guru username and the password secret field to a generated User Token. The User Token is created in the Guru app under Manage > Apps & Integrations > API Access by clicking Generate User Token. User tokens grant read and write access scoped to the generating user's permissions, do not expire unless revoked, and are used as the Basic-auth password, not your web app login password.

setupSteps.title: Generate a User Token in Guru
setupSteps.body: In the Guru web app, open the Manage menu and go to Apps & Integrations, then select the API Access tab. Click Generate User Token, enter a name, and copy the token. Tokens can later be reissued or revoked from the same screen. Only Admins or users with the Manage Apps & Integrations permission can generate tokens.

setupSteps.title: Provide username and token
setupSteps.body: Set the username config field to your Guru username (your account login). Set the password secret field to the User Token you generated. These are used together as HTTP Basic credentials (username:token) against https://api.getguru.com/api/v1/.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credentials
setupSteps.body: Confirm the credentials work by calling the teams endpoint: curl -u USERNAME:TOKEN https://api.getguru.com/api/v1/teams -D -. A successful response returns JSON with your team information.

setupSteps.title: Configure sync options
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date to the earliest date from which to sync. Optionally set search_cards_query to filter which cards are extracted, and set team_id to scope the sync to a specific Guru team.

sources.title: Leveraging Guru's API - obtaining and using User/Collection Tokens (help.getguru.com)
